description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register a new family pram-race team in the 10:00 AM family-friendly race, selecting the children’s hospice charity, setting 4 participants, agreeing to the terms, and choosing to pay in cash on event day.
tasks.name: Register a new family pram-race team in the 10:00 AM family-friendly race, selecting the children’s hospice charity, setting 4 participants, agreeing to the terms, and choosing to pay in cash on event day.
tasks.description: Register a new family pram-race team in the 10:00 AM family-friendly race, selecting the children’s hospice charity, setting 4 participants, agreeing to the terms, and choosing to pay in cash on event day.

tasks.instruction: From the fundraising leaderboard, open the team currently in 3rd place and make a one-off £25 donation to that team, setting your name to display as anonymous and providing example donor details.
tasks.name: From the fundraising leaderboard, open the team currently in 3rd place and make a one-off £25 donation to that team, setting your name to display as anonymous and providing example donor details.
tasks.description: From the fundraising leaderboard, open the team currently in 3rd place and make a one-off £25 donation to that team, setting your name to display as anonymous and providing example donor details.

tasks.instruction: From the merchandise shop, add two medium adult purple T-shirts and one small children’s purple T-shirt to your basket, then go to checkout and select the free standard collection at the registration desk as the delivery option.

target_names: Purple Pram Race T-Shirt - Adult M
Purple Pram Race Kids T-Shirt - Child S

tasks.name: From the merchandise shop, add two medium adult purple T-shirts and one small children’s purple T-shirt to your basket, then go to checkout and select the free standard collection at the registration desk as the delivery option.
tasks.description: From the merchandise shop, add two medium adult purple T-shirts and one small children’s purple T-shirt to your basket, then go to checkout and select the free standard collection at the registration desk as the delivery option.

tasks.instruction: On the volunteer page, sign up for the on-course water-station helper shift that runs from 2:00–4:00 PM on race day, completing the form with the given contact details, choosing T-shirt size Large and confirming you are over 18.
tasks.name: On the volunteer page, sign up for the on-course water-station helper shift that runs from 2:00–4:00 PM on race day, completing the form with the given contact details, choosing T-shirt size Large and confirming you are over 18.
tasks.description: On the volunteer page, sign up for the on-course water-station helper shift that runs from 2:00–4:00 PM on race day, completing the form with the given contact details, choosing T-shirt size Large and confirming you are over 18.

tasks.instruction: Using the interactive route map, add two different viewing spots located between the 1 km and 3 km markers, plus the finish line, to your personal viewing plan and open that plan.
tasks.name: Using the interactive route map, add two different viewing spots located between the 1 km and 3 km markers, plus the finish line, to your personal viewing plan and open that plan.
tasks.description: Using the interactive route map, add two different viewing spots located between the 1 km and 3 km markers, plus the finish line, to your personal viewing plan and open that plan.

tasks.instruction: Register one child aged 7 in the Under 10s Superheroes costume contest for the 9:00 AM judging slot, linking their entry to the confirmed 10:00 AM family fun pram-race team that supports a children’s hospice, and providing the specified participant details and consent.
tasks.name: Register one child aged 7 in the Under 10s Superheroes costume contest for the 9:00 AM judging slot, linking their entry to the confirmed 10:00 AM family fun pram-race team that supports a children’s hospice, and providing the specified participant details and consent.
tasks.description: Register one child aged 7 in the Under 10s Superheroes costume contest for the 9:00 AM judging slot, linking their entry to the confirmed 10:00 AM family fun pram-race team that supports a children’s hospice, and providing the specified participant details and consent.

tasks.instruction: Compare the 5K and 10K race options, identify the race whose entry fee is under £20 and whose start time is later than 11:00 AM, then start a solo adult entry for that race and complete the personal details step with the provided name and date of birth.
tasks.name: Compare the 5K and 10K race options, identify the race whose entry fee is under £20 and whose start time is later than 11:00 AM, then start a solo adult entry for that race and complete the personal details step with the provided name and date of birth.
tasks.description: Compare the 5K and 10K race options, identify the race whose entry fee is under £20 and whose start time is later than 11:00 AM, then start a solo adult entry for that race and complete the personal details step with the provided name and date of birth.

tasks.instruction: Use the FAQ search to find the event’s dog policy, then go to the contact form, choose a general event enquiry and submit a message asking whether you may bring a registered therapy dog to stay with you in the spectator area, including example name and email.

target_names: Can I bring my dog to the event?

expected_values.faq_question: Can I bring my dog to the event?

tasks.name: Use the FAQ search to find the event’s dog policy, then go to the contact form, choose a general event enquiry and submit a message asking whether you may bring a registered therapy dog to stay with you in the spectator area, including example name and email.
tasks.description: Use the FAQ search to find the event’s dog policy, then go to the contact form, choose a general event enquiry and submit a message asking whether you may bring a registered therapy dog to stay with you in the spectator area, including example name and email.

tasks.instruction: On the split-donation page, set a total donation of £40, allocating a larger share to the primary children’s hospice charity and the remainder to the primary food bank charity, opt to cover processing fees, select only the monthly email newsletter in communication preferences, and continue to the donor details step.
